name: twitter-tools
description: Fetch normalized X/Twitter content and download referenced media for downstream agent workflows.

interface.longDescription: Twitter Tools provides X/Twitter data and media skills for upper-layer archive, monitor, translation, and knowledge-ingestion workflows. twitter-fetch emits JSON or JSONL; twitter-media-fetch downloads referenced media and emits a manifest.
interface.defaultPrompt: Fetch this X/Twitter URL and return normalized JSON.
